zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton於1107年11月30日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾時，他的父親Bertram de Verdun46歲，母親Rohese de Salford42歲。他和Lesceline de Clinton至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1166年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton was born on 30 November 1107, in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bertram de Verdun, was 46 and his mother, Rohese de Salford, was 42. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lesceline de Clinton. He died after 1166, in his hometown, and was buried in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton est né le 30 novembre 1107, à Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bertram de Verdun, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Salford, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lesceline de Clinton. Il est décédé après 1166, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England: Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton am 30. November 1107 in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertram de Verdun 46 und seine Mutter Rohese de Salford 42. Er hatte mit Lesceline de Clinton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1166 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton è nato il il 30 novembre 1107 nel Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bertram de Verdun, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Salford, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Lesceline de Clinton. Morì dopo il 1166, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Altonが1107年11月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファルンハム ロイアルで生まれた時，父Bertram de Verdunは46歳，母Rohese de Salfordは42歳であった。彼はLesceline de Clintonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1166年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton(이)가 1107년 11월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 패른함 로야에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertram de Verdun(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Salford(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Lesceline de Clinton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1166년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1107, em Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bertram de Verdun, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Salford, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Lesceline de Clinton. Ele faleceu após 1166, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Norman de Verdun of Farnham Royal and  Alton родился 30 ноября 1107 г. в местности фарнам рояль, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bertram de Verdun было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Salford, 42. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Lesceline de Clinton. Он умер после 1166 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Lesceline de Clinton. Murió después de 1166, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
